structural_setups.summary: 6E requires explicit numeric DXY and Asia to London to NY sequence confirmation before query-ready read-model state is surfaced.
structural_setups.description: Fixture-safe 6E profile foundation using numeric DXY, completed bar confirmation, session segmentation, and thin-liquidity lockout inputs.

query_triggers.description: Trigger only when 6E touches the plan level, completed bars confirm, DXY is explicitly numeric and supportive, and session sequencing is complete.

warnings: Textual dollar context is not sufficient when DXY is required.
Absolute 6E price action is not sufficient without numeric DXY and explicit session sequence confirmation.
Thin liquidity after London close must keep the read model blocked or locked out when active.
